title: Dead by Daylight: Tokyo Ghoul Edition
description:
Dead by Daylight: Tokyo Ghoul Edition

New to The Fog? Check out Dead by Daylight: Tokyo Ghoul Edition, which includes the base game, the Tokyo Ghoul Chapter, and 2 Tokyo Ghoul Outfits: The Ghoul Within for The Ghoul, and Touka’s Struggle for Yui Kimura. Also included are the Maddening Darkness Pack, and the Cursed Legacy Chapter
